programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Takeover
programme.desc: A political boss hires a professional provocateur to stage a violent protest, in a maneuver to discredit his state's governor and elevate his puppet, the mayor, to the governorship in "Takeover"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Missile
programme.desc: The IMF devises an elaborate scheme to dupe foreign agent James Reed into stealing a bogus missile guidance system in "The Missile"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blast
programme.desc: Henry Darrow guest stars as Gregory Tolan, the local leader of a revolutionist group specializing in robberies for the financing of a movement to overthrow the United States government in the "Blast"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: A Ghost Story
programme.desc: Andrew Duggan guest stars as Justin Bainbridge, a multimillionaire paranoid militarist, whose son, Howard, defected behind the Iron Curtain with the formula to a lethal nerve gas he had developed in "A Ghost Story"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Party
programme.desc: The whereabouts of a list of enemy agents operating in the United States are locked in the memory of a captured spy, Col. Vanin (guest star Frank Marth), and no one, including the spy, can penetrate his mind in "The Party"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blind
programme.desc: An F.B.I. man is blinded while investigating a crime syndicate attempting to take over a large chemical plant. Jim Phelps undergoes a delicate eye operation so as to appear convincingly blind when he poses as the sightless man.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encore
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as an aging hoodlum who is artificially transplanted back to the 1930s and the scene of his unsolved crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Tram
programme.desc: The leaders of two underworld factions call a top-level meeting at a ski resort to set up a financial holding company capable of creating chaos within the national economy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Mindbend
programme.desc: To help the IMF team break up a crime syndicate that specializes in brainwashing ex-convicts into committing political assassinations, Barney substitutes for a former prisoner looking for an operation to give himself a new appearance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Shape-Up
programme.desc: Guest stars Gerald S. O'Loughlin and Christopher Stone portray crime syndicate bosses in charge of the waterfront who extort huge sums of money from every ship docking at a west coast port.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Miracle
programme.desc: An undercover agent is murdered while trying to intercept a huge heroin shipment in the Pacific Northwest and the IMF team is called to take over and put the dealer and his chief executioner out of business.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encounter
programme.desc: Guest star Elizabeth Ashley plays the alcoholic wife of a crime syndicate leader whose involvement in an intimidation racket and the cold-blooded murder of an employee puts the IMF team on his trail.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underwater
programme.desc: Stolen gems worth seventy-five million dollars scheduled to be fenced to an underworld figure suddenly disappear and the ship on which they were being transported is blown up at sea bringing the IMF team into the picture.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Invasion
programme.desc: Guest star Kevin McCarthy plays the role of a highly-placed Defense Department advisor who has murdered an Air Force official and sold vital top-secret material about America's nuclear defenses to foreign powers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blues
programme.desc: Barney poses as a prospective rock-music recording artist to get evidence linking an organized crime figurehead played by guest star William Windom to the sudden death of a beautiful recording star who was being blackmailed by the syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Visitors
programme.desc: Guest star Steve Forrest plays the role of a millionaire publisher and communications tycoon who has sold fifty-one percent of his empire to an underworld crime syndicate which gives them a powerful influence over state politics.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nerves
programme.desc: Christopher George guest stars in the role of a psychotic ex-convict determined to wreak vengeance on society.

programme.title: A Christmas Feast
programme.desc: Det er jul og familien Oliverio gjør seg klare til De Syv Fiskers Middag, en italiensk kulinarisk tradisjon som har sine røtter fra gamlelandet. Midt i forberedelsene undrer Tony, en ung mann med store drømmer, om han vil finne kjærligheten i julen.

programme.title: The Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: En kvinne må velge mellom sin stabile ektemann og en lidenskapelig, men uforutsigbar elsker, i et konservativt britisk samfunn på 1950-tallet.

programme.title: Tamara Drewe
programme.desc: Den unge journalisten Tamara Drewe vender tilbake til sine røtter på den engelske landsbygda for å selge sitt barndomshjem etter at hennes mor dør. Hennes ankomst skaper mildt sagt en hel del uro i byen.

programme.title: Peace, Love & Misunderstanding
programme.desc: ”Peace, Love & Misunderstanding” er et hjertevarmt portrett av en fargerik familie. Det som var ment bare å være en helgtur endrer seg raskt til å bli et sommereventyr fylt med romantikk, familiehemmeligheter, og det som trengs for å være lykkelig.

programme.title: Whisky Galore
programme.desc: Under Andre verdenskrig hadde en liten by i Skottland en svært alvorlig mangel på ressurser siden nazistenes krigsinnsats hadde tatt tollen. Dette betydde ofte at det ganske enkelt ikke var nok mat til alle, og enda verre, det var ingen whisky.

programme.title: My Bakery in Brooklyn
programme.desc: Vivien og Chloe har nylig arvet sin tante Isabelles bakeri. Chloe ønsker å endre bakeriets utseende og meny, mens Vivien vil beholde alt slik det alltid har vært. Dette fører til en kamp om hvem som kan lokke til seg kunder på stadig mer kreative måter.

programme.title: Streetdance
programme.desc: Vi følger en dansegruppe som trener hardt for å kunne konkurrere om seieren i det kommende, nasjonale streetdance mesterskapet. De har bare et problem, de mangler et sted hvor de kan øve.

programme.title: Watching the Detectives
programme.desc: Neil er en skikkelig filmfrik som eier en liten videobutikk. Når han ikke sitter som naglet fast foran fjernsynsapparatet og en eller annen film noir, diskuterer han film med de to medarbeiderne sine, supernerden Lucien og den noe mer stabile Jonathan.

programme.title: Youth in Revolt
programme.desc: Michael Cera (SUPERBAD) spiller Nick Twisp. En unik, men elskverdig tenåring med en smak for de sofistikerte tingene i livet. Han forelsker seg i den nydelige og intelligente Sheeni Saunders (Portia Doubleday) på campingferie med familien.

programme.title: A Midsummer's Hawaiian Dream
programme.desc: I denne parafrasen av Shakespeares "A Midsummer Night's Dream" to gifte antropologiprofessorer og studentene deres prøver å finne en hellig tiki for å stoppe ødeleggelsene av Hawaii-jungelen.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shelter
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Purple Testament
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Game of Pool
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Thing About Machines
programme.desc: Bartlett Finchley's paranoia about the machines around proves true.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Spur of the Moment
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Living Doll
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Kind of a Stopwatch
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Distance Call
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Independence Day
programme.desc: A lighthearted Fourth of July road trip turns into a nightmare after Johnny is hit with a vision of Bruce dying in a car crash.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Inside Man
programme.desc: When Johnny foresees the theft of a prized religious artifact on display at Faith Heritage, he infiltrates the band of masked robbers in order to save innocent lives.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Lotto Fever
programme.desc: Johnny is kidnapped by a loser convinced that the psychic ruined his life by helping him win the Lotto.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What You Need
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mirror
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nothing in the Dark
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: One for the Angels
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: And When the Sky Was Opened
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…
programme.sub-title: And When the Sky Was Opened

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Garrity and the Graves
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Will the Real Martian Please Stand Up
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policemen try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.
programme.sub-title: Will the Real Martian Please Stand Up

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: To Serve Man
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: In Praise Of Pip
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Black Leather Jackets
programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Nice Place to Visit
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Heroes & Demons
programme.desc: An autistic boy seeks Johnny's help to save his father (David Neale), a tough cop awaiting execution for the murder of a federal DEA agent.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Last Goodbye
programme.desc: A performance by the son of a rock and roll legend leads Johnny and Sarah (Nicole de Boer) on a search for clues about the mysterious death of his famous father.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Grains of Sand
programme.desc: Johnny (Anthony Michael Hall) faces a difficult decision after saving an infant from a dangerous ring of human traffickers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Live Walter Jameson
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Jeopardy Room
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Changing of the Guard
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Showdown with Rance McGrew
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Young Man's Fancy
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Robots
programme.desc: Walter, Cabe og Happy er fanget sammen med mannskapet i en topphemmelig ubåt når en eksplosjon sender den til bunnen av havet med begrenset oksygen og en selvdestruksjonsfunksjon som snart vil aktiveres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Super Fun Guys
programme.desc: Team Scorpion går undercover på filmen "Super Fun Guy" satt i Kasakhstan for å deaktivere en sovjetisk atommissil som selges av terrorister.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll - Part 1
programme.desc: Walters forsøk på å "normalisere" går fryktelig galt når et virus lastes opp til datamaskinen hans, og gjør Team Scorpions nye "smarte" byggeprosjekt til en brennende dødsfelle med folk innelåst.
programme.sub-title: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll - Part 1

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll - Part 2
programme.desc: Team Scorpion er i et kappløp mot tiden for å demontere dødsfellen og finne kvinnen som dopet Walter før noen blir alvorlig skadet.
programme.sub-title: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll - Part 2

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Teamet må stoppe en sabotert løpsk T-banetog med Paige og Ralph om bord. Toby har sin første boksekamp i sitt forsøk på å imponere Happy.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Area 51
programme.desc: For å hjelpe til med å finansiere Walters forskning for å redde søsterens liv, tar Team Scorpion en lukrativ jobb for CIA for å finne et topphemmelig fly i det mystiske Area 51.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Når teamet og Walters foreldre besøker Megan på sykehuset mens helsen hennes blir dårligere, blir de satt i karantene etter at et dødelig sopputbrudd truer med å infisere alle.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Team Scorpion går undercover på et universitet for å finne en hacker som infiltrerer Federal Reserve og truer med å kollapse verdensøkonomien.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: På julaften må Team Scorpion forhindre en katastrofe når styrtregn skaper en stor sprekk i en demning, som truer med å utslette en hel by i dens kjølvann.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: White Out
programme.desc: For å redde en amerikansk spesialstyrkeenhet fra en sikker død, må Team Scorpion trosse bitende minusgrader i Antarktis.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester står ansikt til ansikt med sin fraværende far, en pensjonert general, som ber Team Scorpion om hjelp, overbevist om at en diktator i Afrika har funnet et masseødeleggelsesvåpen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion har i oppgave å hjelpe NASAs topphemmelige rakettoppskyting, men de må sabotere sitt eget oppdrag når Walters date fra forrige kveld har en bombe festet til brystet hennes.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Fractured
programme.desc: Etter at et kraftig jordskjelv rammer Los Angeles, må Team Scorpion fikse en fastklemt gassledning for å forhindre en massiv eksplosjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Adaptation
programme.desc: Mens Team Scorpion jobber for å stoppe en tilstrømning av narkotika som blir smuglet inn i landet via droner, gir Walter Happy og Toby et ultimatum for deres nye forhold.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Fast and the Nerdiest
programme.desc: Teamet må infiltrere en eksklusiv bilsmuglingsoperasjon som er i ferd med å sende biovåpen til Sør-Amerika.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ticker
programme.desc: Når blodforsyningen til Los Angeles blir hacket og ansett som ubrukelig, må Team Scorpion finne den skyldige og redde en ung jente som desperat trenger en hjertetransplantasjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: Cabe blir tatt til fange under et hemmelig oppdrag i Djibouti sammen med sin nye Homeland-protégé Tim Armstrong, og Team Scorpion må redde ham.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Twist and Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpions oppdrag for redde restene av falne marinesoldater i Vietnam er truet sammen med livet deres når en dødelig tornado kommer direkte mot dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Teamet blir hyret av forsvarsdepartementet for å bryte seg inn i Fort Knox og "stjele" en dyrebar gjenstand for å teste sikkerheten deres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion drar til Tsjernobyl for å reparere den forefallende atomreaktoren før en katastrofal nedsmelting, men må også redde Sylvester og Paige når de blir fanget inne.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Toby or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må være smartere enn deres ustabile eks-Scorpion-medlem, Mark Collins, etter at han kidnapper Toby og truer med å drepe ham med mindre hans utspekulerte krav blir oppfylt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: More Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må legge problemene til side når anonyme hackere med ukjente motiver tar kontroll over amerikanske militærfly og krigsskip og retter våpen mot amerikanske byer.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Danish Lakelands
programme.desc: The Danish Lakelands produce some of the finest ingredients that you can find. Tareq has a go at an old cooking technique from New Zealand called Hangi - using heated rocks buried in a pit oven.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Karlstad
programme.desc: Tareq visits sunny Karlstad! Here, food is prepared by Vänern's shores and in Värmland's deep forests. Butter-fried Zander, crepes and cooking over an open fire are on the menu.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of (Part 2)
programme.desc: Once again, Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lund
programme.desc: In this episode, Tareq visits Lund, a thousand-year old city in southern Sweden. Lund is surrounded by the richest farmland in the country, and we explore nearby islands and meet entrepreneurs making highly-regarded local products.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Snikmorder
programme.desc: Don og teamet finner en mistenkelig kode under en razzia, og Charlie slår fast at den er en del av en hemmelig plan om å drepe en colombianer som lever i eksil i Los Angeles.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Avgjørende beslutning
programme.desc: I premieren av andre sesong bruker Don Charlie og Megans ekspertise da FBI blir kalt inn for å etterforske drapet på en føderal dommers kone.

programme.title: Numb3rs: På godt og vondt
programme.desc: Don og teamet må finne dem som står bak bortføringen av familien til en gullsmed før de blir drept.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Besettelse
programme.desc: Don og teamets leting etter stalkeren av en popprinsesse blir forvandlet til en drapsetterforskning.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Kalkulert risiko
programme.desc: Don og teamet må løse drapet på en finansdirektør i et stort strømselskap, som blir funnet drept utenfor ytterdøren sin, og hennes unge sønn er det eneste vitnet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Lett offer
programme.desc: Don og agentene må finne ut hvem som blandet seg inn i en anti-terror-øvelse før det får dødelige utfall.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Sammenfall
programme.desc: Da en far blir drept under et innbrudd, etterforsker Don og teamet forbindelsen mellom flere ran i et rikmannsstrøk.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Lett synlig
programme.desc: Megan og et team med FBI-agenter avslører en stor metamfetamin-lab, men de mister lederen da han detonerer en bombe, stikker av og dreper en av agentene under Megans kommando.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Giftstoff
programme.desc: En tidligere kjemiker ved et stort farmasøytisk selskap har tuklet med noen medisiner, og Don og Megan må finne ham.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Helt inn til beina
programme.desc: Da en ung forsker ved Heritage Museum blir funnet død, kalles Don og Megan inn for å etterforske dødsfallet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Forbrent
programme.desc: Don og teamet må finne brannstifteren som står bak en uskyldig manns død. "Bill Nye the Science Guy" har gjesterolle som professor Waldie, som hjelper Charlie og Larry med å gjenskape backdraft-effekten ved Cal Scis laboratorium.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Gangster
programme.desc: Da en FBI-agent som jobber undercover blir drept i et gjengoppgjør, må Don og teamet etterforske saken.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Satsning
programme.desc: Da FBI kalles inn for å etterforske et drap ved en pokerklubb i Los Angeles, avslører Don og agentene en komplisert korttellingsplan der en gruppe collegestudenter, hvis liv nå står i fare, er innblandet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Innhøsting
programme.desc: Etter å ha avdekket at en ung kvinnelig immigrant døde da hun solgte en av nyrene sine, må agentene stoppe et nettverk som selger organer.

programme.title: Numb3rs: På flukt
programme.desc: En naturfagsstudent ved Cal Sci blir mistenkt da en dyr maskin blir stjålet fra skolens DNA-lab.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Protest
programme.desc: En anti-krig-bombe som dreper en uskyldig mann blir en personlig affære da etterforskningen avdekker overraskende informasjon om fortiden til Don og Charlies far.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Psykologisk spill
programme.desc: Da en synsk mann fører myndighetene til et drapssted, prøver Charlie å bevise at det var en ren tilfeldighet. John Glover spiller Samuel Kraft, en synsk mann som leder letemannskapet til et åsted i villmarken.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Alt er lov
programme.desc: Da en kvinnelig aktivist fra Irak blir drept på amerikansk jord, etterforsker FBI drapet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Mørk materie
programme.desc: Don og teamet etterforsker en skoleskyting, men blir overrasket av en av de mistenkte.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Våpen og roser
programme.desc: Don tar en nærmere titt på livet sitt etter at han etterforsker omstendighetene rundt en tidligere kjærestes dødsfall.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell 2.0
programme.desc: A film that has spawned a thousand imitations but never been bettered – Mamoru Oshii's legendary anime film Ghost in the Shell returns in a stunning new edition remastered by Oshii himself with the original animations.

programme.title: Disaster Movie
programme.desc: DISASTER MOVIE fortsetter den komiske nedturen til din yndlingsgruppe med latterlig attraktive 20-åringer. En skjebnesvanger natt prøver de å komme seg i trygghet mens enhver kjent naturkatastrofe, knuser byen og deres vei.

programme.title: Number 17
programme.desc: En gjeng tyver samles i et trygt hus etter et ran, men en detektiv er på sporet deres.

programme.title: Pumping Iron
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger og Lou Ferrigno møter hverandre i en intens konkurranse om Mr. Olympia-tittelen i denne kritikerroste filmen som gjorde Schwarzenegger berømt.

programme.title: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: Libby Parsons, who discovers that the husband she’s convicted of murdering staged his own “death” and framed her for the crime. Released on parole, she skips town to find him–and that puts parole officer Travis Lehman on her trail.

programme.title: Asteroid
programme.desc: En mann flytter med kona og datteren fra storbyen til sitt drømmehus i utkanten av en småby, langt unna all kommunikasjon. Timingen kunne imidlertid vært bedre da det viser seg at verden holder på å kollapse.

programme.title: Blackmail
programme.desc: Etter å ha drept en mann i selvforsvar, blir en ung kvinne utpresset av et vitne til drapet.

programme.title: Cold War
programme.desc: En lidenskapelig kjærlighetshistorie mellom to personer med forskjellig bakgrunn og temperament, på tross av at de er en dårlig match klarer de ikke å gi slipp på hverandre.

programme.title: Wim Wenders Collection: Don't Come Knocking
programme.desc: En aldrende cowboyfilm-stjerne rømmer fra et filmsett for å gjenoppta kontakten med moren sin som han ikke har sett på tretti år, bare for å finne ut at han har et barn han aldri visste om.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He's a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King...but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Wim Wenders Collection: Wings of Desire aka Der Himmel über Berlin
programme.desc: En høyt lovprist og prisbelønnet film, som blant annet fikk prisen for beste regi i Cannes i 1987. Damiel er en ensom engel som streifer omkring i Berlins krigsmerkede gater og trøster dødelige i nød.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Robin kommer uventet tilbake etter å ha havnet på feil side av Rebecca og lovens lange arm.
programme.sub-title: Love Is a Really, Really Perfectly Okay Thing

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Kevin McHale slutter seg til Cheers-gjengen i en basketballkamp mot den rivaliserende baren.

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca blir forvirret når Robins eks forteller til pressen at hun er hans sanne kjærlighet.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Ma Clavin flytter inn hos Woody når Cliff vender henne bort.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Norm kjemper for å redde favorittstedet fra å bli revet.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca planlegger et overraskelsesbesøk til hennes fengslede kjærlighet, Robin.
programme.sub-title: Breaking in Is Hard to Do

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam mister besinnelsen når en annen restauranteier overtar biljardrommet og toalettene

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woody promoterer en fryktelig grønnsaksdrink under hans første kommersielle opptreden.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Cliff og Norms narrestreker gjør at Sam og Frasier går i strid mot hverandre.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woody frykter for å miste Kelly når hun kommer tilbake med en franskmann.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla motstår morens siste ønske om å gi nytt navn til sønnen Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam hevner seg på restauranteieren John Allen Hill ved å date datteren hans.

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam prøver å hindre Rebecca i å gifte seg med Robin etter at hun forteller som følelsene sine.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam etterlater utilsiktet en melding på Rebeccas maskin om at han elsker henne.
programme.sub-title: I'm Getting My Act Together and Sticking It in Your Face

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam skader ryggen når han ferierer valentindagen med sin gamle flamme.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebecca slår seg sammen med John Hill for å kjøpe baren fra Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Kona til Norm tar en jobb på restauranten over Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woody øker besøksantallet på Cheers ved å selge sin berømte chili.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Cliff stiller som dommer i Miss Barmaid-konkurransen for å vinne Carlas gunst.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam planlegger å slå ut en gammel baseballrival under en veldedighetskamp.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frasier frykter Lilith mister forstanden når hun blir overveldet av sorg over døden til en av laboratorierottene hennes.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam låser seg ute av huset mens han sitter barnevakt for Lilith og Frasiers sønn.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam legger ut på jakt etter en passende mor til hans fremtidige barn.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam og Rebecca søker psykiatrisk hjelp for å komme i rett stemning.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Gutta på Cheers blir strandet når de tar en biltur langs Route 66.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carlas spåkone ber henne om å overta virksomheten.

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cops: Tow Time
programme.desc: Police conduct a high-speed chase on a car with a missing tire. Police respond to a tow truck driver being assaulted. Police are called when a relative attacks a woman's husband.

programme.title: Cops: Borderlands
programme.desc: Officers attempt to detain undocumented border crossers. Border patrol discovers a driver with a load of drugs in his car. Officers check passports and a suspicious-looking laptop.

programme.title: Cops: Visiting Hours Twofer
programme.desc: Police respond to a report of prostitution in a hospital parking lot. A man and woman engaged in solicitation are pulled over. A woman in an area known for prostitution tries to evade police.

programme.title: Cops: Ignorance is an Excuse
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claim that they didn't know the car they are driving was stolen.

programme.title: Cops: Checked Luggage
programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: Cops: Uncomfortable Shoes
programme.desc: A driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a motorist with a funny walk is hiding something up his shoe.

programme.title: Cops: In-Law Problems
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is turned in by his ex-girlfriends mother.

programme.title: Cops: Set Some Boundaries
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets 'too friendly' with a woman in the home.

programme.title: Cops: Invisible Intruders
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he's just trying to return the vehicle.. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: Cops: Dance Fighting
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood 'Old West' style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: Cops: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom.

programme.title: Cops: Tree Hugging
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver has suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: Cops: Crawling to Vegas
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: Cops: First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers bust up an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she's just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: Cops: Safe Cracking
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he's selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home.

programme.title: Cops: High Jump Fail
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. An intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he's not trying to run away.

programme.title: Cops: Bumming a Smoke
programme.desc: A runaway motorcycle tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: Cops: Neighborhood Rage
programme.desc: A suspect ditches his bike when stopped and tries to outrun the police. Neighbors fight out a road rage incident with rocks and a baseball bat.

programme.title: Cops: My Bills Won't Wait
programme.desc: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs.

programme.title: Cops: Family Therapy
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Cops: Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked.

programme.title: Cops: Nightvision
programme.desc: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman.

programme.title: Cops: Now It's Lawn Furniture
programme.desc: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit's help.

programme.title: Cops: Don't Make her Angry
programme.desc: A man needs police assistance when his angry ex-girlfriend crawls through his window. Police must play hide-and-seek when they attempt to execute an arrest warrant.

programme.title: Cops: And Through the Woods
programme.desc: Officers chase a fleeing suspect as he runs through the woods and into a rose bush. An elderly man puts himself in the middle of a knife fight.

programme.title: Cops: Fight and Flight
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: Cops: Who Let the Dogs Out?
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: Cops: Dead Man Flushing
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: Cops: Pistol Packin' Families
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: Cops: Grown Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: Cops: Kill 'Em With Kindness
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: Cops: The Fighting Kind
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: Cops: Cell Phone Secrets
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops: Guns, Hash, and Fire Hydrants
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: Cops: Get Off My Roof
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: Cops: This Man Stabbed Me
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: Cops: Blood and Scars, Bro!
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot en galakse med enestående action og eventyr når kaptein Jean-Luc Picard (Patrick Stewart) og hans Starship-mannskap kjempet mot en farlig motstander... Som har en overraskende kobling til Picard!

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Triple Murders in Vise
programme.desc: On May 17th 2005, a body is discovered in a forest of Sucy-en-Brie; Christophe Belle, 40 years old, a renowned pastry cook.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mathilde Croguenne Case
programme.desc: In the early hours of the morning, Mathilde Croguennec, 18, attending \"Teknival\" in Brittany, is found at the foot of a tree with her throat cut. Investigators face the task of finding the killer among the 43,000 participants of this festival

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case
programme.desc: On October 13th 1996, the body of young Angélique Dumetz, 18 years old, is recovered down a ditch in Oise forest. An important clue is found on the crime scene.
programme.sub-title: In Search of SK1 - Akira Ojima Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Evelyne Boucher Case
programme.desc: On December 9th 1987, the naked body of the young Evelyne Boucher is found near Avignon. An unprecedented investigation begins making headlines.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Sylvie Darcy Case
programme.desc: On February 26th 2012, in the Yevelines. Around 11PM policemen are called for an assault in a parking lot in the forest of Saint-Lambet-des-Bois.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Hanging On Houseboat (Aubry case)
programme.desc: Dominique Aubry, a rich widow of 58, is found hanged on her barge in Neuilly. It appears that since the death of her husband on a trip to Mauritius, Dominique Aubry has been ailing.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Hanging On Houseboat (Aubry case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Only DNA Can Say - Angélique Dumetz
programme.desc: On February 23th 2017, policemen are alerted of the disapearrance of Brigitte Troadec, her husband Pascal, and their children Sébastien and Charlotte.
programme.sub-title: Only DNA Can Say - Angélique Dumetz

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Jean-Raymond Blatti Case
programme.desc: Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant. The man is lying in a pool of blood and, on his belly, the murderer has written \"DIRTY RAPIST\".

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)
programme.desc: Police in Strasbourg receive a startling emergency call from Doctor Jean-Louis Muller, a forensic pathologist well known in the region.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Christophe Lejard Case
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. An execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of a quiet family man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)
programme.desc: The body of Nathalie Villermet, 46, manager of a small hotel and -restaurant, is found by a walker in the woods outside Paris, hidden under branches.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Little Martyrship of A10: The Inass Touloub Affair
programme.desc: On August 11, 1987, the Orléans police discover the bruised corpse of a 4-year-old child behind a guardrail on the A10 motorway.
programme.sub-title: The Little Martyrship of A10: The Inass Touloub Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Céline Marchand Case
programme.desc: On May 30th 2015 in Sorinières, Yann Machand reports his wife Céline Marchand missing.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Victims of a Sadist - Cyril Koskinas Case
programme.desc: On July 19th 2004, the naked and tied up body of a woman is recovered in the Ourcq canal in Fresnes-sur-Marne. The victim is impossible to identify.
programme.sub-title: Victims of a Sadist - Cyril Koskinas Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Shadow of A Serial Killer: The Sophie Le Tan Case
programme.desc: On September 7, 2018, in Strasbourg, Sophie Le Tan is about to celebrate her 20th birthday with her family.
programme.sub-title: The Shadow of A Serial Killer: The Sophie Le Tan Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell Case
programme.desc: After an ordinary dinner, Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell suffer severe abdominal pains. Taken to hospital, the couple die several days apart. The food poisoning theory is quickly ruled out and forensic tests show the Labrells were poisoned with arsenic.
programme.sub-title: The Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell Case

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 310
programme.desc: Vi møter bodybuilderen Ulla som ønsket seg kvinnelige bryster, men som nå har så store implantater at hun har vanskelig for å trene. Patrik har fått fjernet hud på magen, men er misfornøyd.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 606
programme.desc: Claudia går ned 100 kilo og får deretter fjernet overflødig hud. For å avslutte reisen mot en kropp som Claudia kan føle seg stolt av, bestemte hun seg for å gjøre en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jane, som ikke lenger har lyst på sex på grunn av de stygge brystene sine, og Julie, som misliker seg selv på grunn av de store arrene hun fikk etter en brystreduksjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 904
programme.desc: Jeannes bryster hindrer henne i å leve et normalt liv. Gitte skammer seg over beina og bruker enormt mye tid og energi på å skjule dem.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 308
programme.desc: Lizette sitter igjen med et knallhardt bryst etter en forstørrende operasjon, mens Diana går med voldsomme smerter etter en brystreduksjon. Begge håper de å få hjelp av de erfarne kirurgene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Under sin siste fødsel gjennomgikk Sonja et akutt keisersnitt som, noe utradisjonelt, ble kuttet vertikalt på Sonjas mage. Sonjas navle ble kuttet opp, og resultatet er til en stor ulempe for henne.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 309
programme.desc: Ditte har brukt 120 000 kroner på å få større bryster - som er asymmetriske. Eva har fått utført en brystreduksjon, men føler seg nå mer maskulin enn feminin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 802
programme.desc: For første gang i programmets historie har både mor og datter havnet i et plastisk mareritt, og begge trenger hjelp.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Isabella, som fikk utført brystforstørring som 18-åring for å ligne Pamela Anderson, men som i dag sitter igjen med to steinharde kuler på brystkassen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 104
programme.desc: Pernille får kick av å få utført plastisk kirurgi, men armene hennes er vansiret av store arr. Mille drømmer om at de feilopererte brystene hennes blir fiksa før bryllupet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 205
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Dianne, som fikk fjernet brystene grunnet mistanke om kreft, men som nå lever alene fordi hun føler seg utilpass, og Anette, som fikk foretatt en hudoperasjon i utlandet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Doris var med i en alvorlig bussulykke og i dag sliter hun med ekstreme bivirkninger av en operasjon som egentlig skulle ha reddet utseendet hennes etter ulykken.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 601
programme.desc: Charlotte fikk fjernet brystimplantatene sine på grunn av komplikasjoner. Etter det fikk hun en protese for å kompensere for størrelsen på brystene, men protesen er både ubehagelig og upraktisk.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 106
programme.desc: Vi møter fire personer som har gjort plastikkirugi som har fått ødeleggende konsekvenser: blant annet Lone som lever i frykt for at implantatene hennes er kreftfremkallende.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jonna, som føler at magen hennes ligner et bombekrater etter en operasjon, og Christina, som har tre mislykkede operasjoner bak seg.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 703
programme.desc: Den tidligere burlesk-danseren Grethe måtte i 2011 fjerne begge brystene som en del av hennes behandling av brystkreft.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 101
programme.desc: I kveldens episode møter vi fire ofre for plastiskkirurgiske feiloperasjoner.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Siden puberteten, har Tascha vært lei av sine asymmetriske bryster og har hatt en brystoperasjon. Men Tascha fikk ikke symmetrien hun drømte om, og i dag skammer hun seg over brystene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 805
programme.desc: Som tenåring har Linette en skjev skillevegg i nesen som gir henne pustevansker. Som 21-åring får hun derfor tilbud om en neseoperasjon for å fikse problemet, men ender opp med en skjev nese.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 105
programme.desc: Sabine fant et tilbud på nettet, men måtte betale dyrt for å spare 50 prosent.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.
