programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Testing The Newbies
programme.desc: Nathan vil teste hvor ville de nye arbeiderne er. Chloe vender tilbake, Marnie og Marty barker sammen over Aaron og alle får et kjempesjokk når de ser den seneste nykommeren. Marty prøver å snakke med Chloe, som vender ham ryggen.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Sam's Smashed
programme.desc: Martys plan om å sjarmere Elettra med en ny hårfarge går skeis, og Marnie er redd for at hun gir Aaron blandede signaler. Chloe kaster seg over en nykommer - kan han hjelpe henne med å glemme Marty?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Newbies Throw A Party
programme.desc: Marnie er kjempespent når en ny deltager kommer, men Aaron vil at hun skal ta en tøff beslutning. Marty gir ikke opp om Elettra, men Chloe har andre planer. Gaz gir nykommerne den ultimate testen: En hjemmefest.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Newbies Get Cut
programme.desc: Huset er i sjokk etter at Marnie stakk da Aaron og Chelsea fant sammen. Elettra og Marty barker sammen om badekarsflørten og Chloe provoserer Marty til bristepunktet. Gaz har brutale nyheter til nykommerne.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Scott Returns
programme.desc: Sjefen Anna har sendt gjengen til Tignes i de franske Alpene for å stå på ski. Scotty T er tilbake og legger straks an på nykommerne. Og når Anna avslører sin nyeste plan for de nye arbeiderne, blir Marty misfornøyd.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Conflicting Feelings
programme.desc: Det er en ubehagelig stemning mellom nykommerne. Scotty T og Abbie finner sammen, og Sarah er ikke glad for det. Zahida blåser seg opp mot Marty, og Gary tar hevn på Sam. Marnie er tilbake og drikker seg dritings, som ødelegger for Aaron.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Scott's Up To Something
programme.desc: Det er siste dagen i pisten. Aaron er på sjekkeren med sin wingman Gaz, Abbie og Sarah konkurrerer om Scotty T., og det blir enda verre når han prøver seg på Zahida.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Another Newbie Gets Cut
programme.desc: Gjengen drar tilbake til huset og gir nykommerne den verste oppgaven hittil - å suge på tåa til Chloe! Zahida og Scotty kommer hverandre nærmere, men klarer de å holde det hemmelig? Sjefen Anna har store nyheter, og en blir sendt hjem.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Friends Again
programme.desc: Marty drikker seg dritings og får lyst på eksen sin. Vil Chloe like det? Sjefen Anna har en overraskelse på lur til nykommerne. Zahida prøver å få snakket ut med Sarah og Abbie, men det gjør ting bare verre.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Welcome To The Family
programme.desc: Geordiene arrangerer en stor bursdagsfest for Nathan, med en helt spesiell kake. Sjefen Anna må bestemme hvem som skal få bli i huset - Abbie, Sarah eller Zahida? Sesongens siste episode.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Wasted Night In
programme.desc: Geordie-gjengen er tilbake i en eksplosiv ny serie! En gammel venn blir med i familien igjen. Under en bytur oppstår det sprekker i vennegjengen.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Dropping Like Flies
programme.desc: En morsom kveld på byen surner fort når Chloe, Nathan og Marty-trekanten koker over og resulterer i en slåsskamp. Like etter bestemmer noen seg for at nok er nok og forlater huset.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gary's News
programme.desc: Marnie knytter tettere bånd med Aaron når det nærmer seg hans debut som MMA-utøver. Marty vil bli venner med Chloe igjen, og alle elsker at Gaz vender tilbake som single og klar for å treffe nye damer.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Fight Night
programme.desc: Det er Aarons kamp! Marnie blir følsom. Scott & Marty kan ikke oppdrives når de skal tilbake. En nakenfest i badestampen, en matkrig og litt pulehule-action. Altså bare nok en kveld i Geordie Shore-huset!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Arrivederci Newcastle
programme.desc: Anna kunngjør at Scotty og Marty ikke skal komme tilbake. Men gjengen får ikke tid til å deppe, fordi de skal til Roma for å lære italienerne hvordan man fester på Geordie-vis!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Chloe's Challenge
programme.desc: Gærningene er i Roma og sjefen Anna har jobb til dem - å vise romerne hvordan man fester i Geordie-stil! Nathan er irritert på Chloe, Gaz og Abbie kommer nærmere hverandre og Aaron forteller Gaz at han vil prøve med Marnie, men vil hun det?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Triple Date
programme.desc: Abbie våkner opp og føler at hun har kontrollen over hennes og Gaz' forhold. Mens Nathan og Chloe blir sammen igjen, drar resten av gjengen på laserkrig der Gaz kun konsentrerer seg om Abbie.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Has Gary Met His Match?
programme.desc: Aaron våkner på bursdagen sin med tømmermenn og en sinna Marnie. På Aarons fest har både Gary og Abbie godt blikk for andre gjester og Marnie gir Aaron en gave han ikke vil komme til å glemme så lett.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Couples Counselling
programme.desc: Mens gjengen gjør seg rede til å forlate huset, må Marnie bestemme seg rundt henne og Aarons forhold. Gary og Abbie er glade for sitt åpne forhold, men når Marnie prater med Aaron kan det virke som om Maaron er slutt for godt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Shore Shower
programme.desc: MVP er tilbake og muliggjør en nær-trekantopplevelse for Vinny. Gjengen treffer på Angelina i en klubb. Jentene sliter med å holde babyfesten hemmelig for Nicole, og Vinny liker ikke tanken på seg selv og Jionni sammen på babyfesten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Awkward!
programme.desc: Vinnie prater ut med Jionni og de ordner opp i flokene, så Vin og Nicole kan gjenoppta vennskapet om de vil. Samtidig innser Mike de feilene han har gjort og forsøker å få Nicoles tilgivelse.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Raining Men & Meatballs
programme.desc: Kjøttbollene tar over strandpromenaden og holder audition for å finne en midlertidig festkompis til Deena. Mike avslører at han var stripper før i tiden og romkameratene får ham til å vise sine kunster.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Icing on the Cake
programme.desc: Det er slutten på sommeren, og slutten på en lang reise for romkameratene når de forbereder seg på å ta et siste farvel med Seaside.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Reunion
programme.desc: Hver sommer kommer tusenvis av unge til Jersey Shore for å delta i østkystens overgangsritual: The Shore House. Jersey Shore viser dette fenomenet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 606
programme.desc: Deena forteller om da hun ble arrestert, Jenni og Rogers forhold analyseres, og Vinny forteller åpent om sin fordel.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 608
programme.desc: Deena og Sam starter en kjempekrangel på sofaen etter å ha sett noen provoserende klipp fra denne sesongen. Og Vinni feirer sin avgjørelse om å gå inn i sølibatet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Best of Reunions
programme.desc: Amy Paffrath viser alle høydepunkter og lavmålene fra tidligere gjenforeninger, inkludert noen opptak som aldri er vist før.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A New Family
programme.desc: Sommeren på Jersey Shore starter når åtte personer flytter inn i sommerhuset. Romantikken blomstrer mellom Sammy og Mike, men kan bli spolert når gutta inviterer tre tilfeldige jenter i boblebadet med dem.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Med støtte fra de fleste av de andre er Snooki på bedringens vei. Ronnies familie kommer på besøk, og Sammi ønsker å gjøre et godt førsteinntrykk. JWoww blir lei folkene i klubben og havner i slåsskamp.
programme.sub-title: Just Another Day at the Shore

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: Mike ber jenter til huset, og situasjonen kommer ut av kontroll. Snooki havner i slåsskamp igjen. Ronnie havner også i bråk, og Sammi begynner å tvile på forholdet deres.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: What Happens in the AC
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Atlantic City, der moro blir til alvor idet Mike støter fra seg både Snooki og Jwoww. En av deltakerne avslører at hun har hatt spiseforstyrrelser.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Man får svar på mange spørsmål når Snooki, The Situation, Jwoww, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi og Vinny kommer tilbake for mer krangling og innsikt i hva som faktisk foregikk i strandhuset i Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Goin' South
programme.desc: Gjengen skal til Miami! Mike, Pauly D, Snooki og JWoww kjører, mens de andre tar fly. Tidligere deltaker Angelina skaper drama. Ronnie og Sammi er blitt single, men det er fortsatt komplisert.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Hangover
programme.desc: Sammi vil vite hva Ronnie gjorde på klubben kvelden før, men ingen vil si det. Angelina avbryter Paulys spill, og den vanligvis så rolige Pauly D viser en helt ny side.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Creepin'
programme.desc: Angelina ber jentene om unnskyldning. Mike, Vinny og Pauly leker med granater i boblebadet, og Ron fortsatt har hemmeligheter for Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Breaking Up
programme.desc: Sammi og Ronnie har problemer, og Sammi prøver å slå opp, men tar Ronnie tilbake etter 5 minutter. Jentene legger en plan for å fortelle Sammi sannheten om kjæresten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Letter
programme.desc: Sammi finner det 'anonyme' brevet fra Snooki og Jenni, og nå er det virkelig slutt - i hvert fall en stund. Mike, Vinny og Pauly har hendene fulle med fire jenter på én kveld.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 508
programme.desc: Johannes skal levere brakker – men kaster ved et uhell nøklene på taket. Spesialtransportørene og ekteparet Anton og Angelica har en kjøretur sammen - til Norge. Emina kjører kjøtt i Skåne.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 701
programme.desc: I det nordlige vinterlandskapet må Anton stoppe transporten av et tungt toglokomotiv når tilhengeren går i stykker. Elin, en melkebilsjåfør, starter dagen rolig, helt til en melkeslange ryker og kaos oppstår.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 703
programme.desc: Kellys stressende dag blir verre når det viser seg at flere bedrifter holder stengt på grunn av ferien. Emina må rekke en fotballkamp, men det blir full stopp hos den første kunden da hun ikke kommer seg inn på lageret.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 705
programme.desc: Tove dekker opp for vikarer som har sommerferie og jobber derfor på dagtid. De nye arbeidstidene i det sommerlige Småland byr på andre problemer enn vanlig.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 706
programme.desc: Kranfører Carl har blitt bedt om å flytte en havnekran som veier nesten 200 tonn og er 33 meter høy. Men arbeidet må brått avbrytes fordi det er fare for at kranen kan velte når en del mangler.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 707
programme.desc: Mattias må hente kviger i Enköping og deretter hente en okse på Ljusterö, noe som ikke viser seg å være lett.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 708
programme.desc: I Stockholm har Max en tøff dag og sliter med å få med seg alle søppeldunkene som skal tømmes. Han gleder seg til den siste tømmingen for dagen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 201
programme.desc: Simon fra Piteå har tatt over som administrerende direktør i transportfirmaet etter sin far Erik. Jörgen fra Höganäs må kjøre et 58 meter langt blad til en vindturbin og støter på utfordringer i svingene.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 202
programme.desc: Erik Lundman i Lundmans transportfirma sliter med en kloakktank, postbud Stephanie gjør en feil og taper tid under en hastetur, og spesialtransportør Jari får utrolig nok tre punkteringer.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 203
programme.desc: Jesper er bekymret for å komme for sent til avlastningen i Danmark. Tove får en dårlig start på dagen og krasjer med tømmerbilen sin. Og Jari havner i feil havn under lossing.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 204
programme.desc: Louise har en uvanlig tung forsendelse med to ismaskiner som skal fraktes til en ishockeybane utenfor Stockholm. Robin, som kjører biler verdt millioner, har en kjøretur med en veldig fin Cobra fra 1965.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 205
programme.desc: Familiebedriften Tösse wedins har en ny kunde som trenger den erfarne tømmerbilsjåføren og administrerende direktøren i selskapet, "Höna", til å kjøre en lastebil.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 301
programme.desc: Anton og broren transporterer en gravemaskin på den lokale "Dødens vei". Sam, en miljøarbeider, er opprørt over det moderne menneskets livsstil. Og Tove drar til en skog for å samle tømmer.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 302
programme.desc: I Hässleholm skal Jörgen kjøre en bro med en uvanlig form, der du virkelig må tenke på å løfte hvis du ikke vil at sikkerhetsanordningene skal svikte.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 303
programme.desc: Stephanie guider oss gjennom vanskelighetene med å være leveringssjåfør i Stockholm. Anders kjører et stort elektrisk hus fra Öjebyn til Boliden, og det må ikke få riper.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 304
programme.desc: Anders er på vei til Boliden med en 20 tonn tung og 20 meter lang container, men til tross for forberedelser havner han på feil vei. Elin blir skikkelig stresset når hun havner midt i rushtrafikken i Stockholm.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 305
programme.desc: I Kristinehamn i Sverige er Jörgen i ferd med å laste en 135 tonn tung barktønne da et høyt smell stopper lasteprosessen. Spylebilsjåføren Magnus og kollegaen Bruno sjekker et overvannsrør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 401
programme.desc: Å finne frem i skogen er lettere sagt enn gjort. For den nyankomne tømmerbilsjåføren Linda betyr det at hun kommer på etterskudd i et allerede stramt tidsskjema.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 402
programme.desc: I Gøteborg flytter spesialtransportøren Jonathan campinghytter, og været er ikke på hans side. I Stockholm er rotter et problem, og Max, en søppelmann, vil helst slippe å møte dem.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 403
programme.desc: I Stockholm tømmer Max søppeldunker i kjendistette nabolag. Jörgen transporterer en 25 tonn tung gryte i Skåne, og veien dit er både smal og ujevn.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 404
programme.desc: Spesialtransportøren Johan transporterer 30 meter lange trebjelker. Slamsugeren Magnus tar seg av en pumpegrop, en risikofylt jobb på grunn av de farlige gassene som produseres.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girls Who Go To The Prom
programme.desc: Greeted by Miss J and a high school marching band, the girls were divided into teams and taught a runway walking routine based on timing and precision.
programme.sub-title: The Girls Who Go To The Prom

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Cries All The Time
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at Salon Sessions Studio by Tyra, Jay and Miss J for their dramatic makeovers.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Cries All The Time

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Changes Her Attitude
programme.desc: After being pulled over by what they thought was a traffic cop, the girls were taught the art of posing by vogue instructor Benny Ninja.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Changes Her Attitude

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Takes Credit
programme.desc: The girls met with the director of Elite Model Management Cathy Gould and Elite Model Claudia Mason, who taught them all about personal style and how to dress appropriately.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Gets Thrown In The Pool
programme.desc: The girls were greeted by Twiggy and ANTM: Cycle Seven participant Melrose who taught them the importance of having a memorable name.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Gets Thrown In The Pool

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Impresses Pedro
programme.desc: The girls met with actress Tia Mowry (The Game) who taught them how to portray different characters through voice and movement.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girls Who Go Down Under
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at their house by Cycle 2 participant April, who gave them advice on how to be a correspondent and conduct a good interview.
programme.sub-title: The Girls Who Go Down Under

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Picks a Fight
programme.desc: In this special recap episode, never-before-seen footage about the journey of the five remaining contestants is revealed, including a heated argument between two girls and a staged mock elimination by all the girls.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Picks a Fight

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Blames The Taxi Driver
programme.desc: The girls met with the owner of Priscilla's Model Management, Priscilla Leighton Clark, and Australian model Jodhi Meares, who organized and booked several designers to meet them on Go Sees.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Blames The Taxi Driver

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Does Not Want To Dance
programme.desc: The girls met with Aboriginal Elder Uncle Max and his niece Calita, who taught them about the native Australian art of storytelling through dance.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Does Not Want To Dance

programme.title: America's Next Top Model: The Girl Who Becomes America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The three remaining models participated in a national photoshoot for Cover Girl's Lipshine Lip Color and a My Life as a CoverGirl commercial.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Becomes America's Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra surprises the girls with a lounge singing performance, and the competition gets tough as strong personalities rise and the catfights begin.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Jay Manuel meets the models and introduces them to their new green form of transportation.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: J. Alexander shocks the girls with a scary lesson on perfecting their runway walk while wearing straightjackets.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra gives the girls a sneak peek at their makeovers at a Beverly Hills salon. Most of the models get dramatic makeovers, but one is driven to the breaking point when she has to cut off all her hair.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Benny Ninja gives the girls a lesson on how to pose with movement. The models must pose in the air while jumping on a trampoline, some girls rise while others flop.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Is Afraid Of Heights

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Male model Tyson Beckford surprises the models at the house and gives them a lesson on being a spokesperson. Most pull off an impromptu sales pitch for their teacher, but a few have a hard time concentrating on their task.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Gets A Mango

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With the finale only six weeks away, never-before-seen footage includes Bianca’s confrontations with Chantal and Ebony, and Jenah chips her tooth.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Runs Into The Glass Door

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra surprises the girls and gives them an in-depth lesson about how to model in front of a moving camera. One model continues to get jealous and be very critical of her competition.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models go to FIDM (Fashion Institute of Design and Merchandising) and are paired with a student designer to be their creative muse to design a dress.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Starts To Lose Her Cool

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Buy Beer / Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test. / Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride. / Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.
programme.sub-title: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV. / With a big test looming, our favorite idiots receive an education in cheating. / Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in an elevator with a smokin hot chick
programme.sub-title: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery
programme.desc: The school closes and makes the best day / Butt-Head phones in a mail-order bride / Burger World launches a home delivery service
programme.sub-title: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Stewart is Missing / Yard Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Stevenson shows up at Butt-head's house, desperate to enlist their help in finding Stewart. / Tom Anderson get Beavis and Butt-head to watch his yard sale, and the boys manage to sell everything when they take the sale inside.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Tainted Meat / Bad Dog
programme.desc: Beavis and his bacteria ridden "thingy" contaminate the food at Burger World. / Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Crisis line / Career day
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head set out to support callers on a crisis line / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: An evening of trick-or-treating takes a strange turn when Beavis becomes the Great Cornholio.
programme.sub-title: Bungholio: Lord of The Harvest (aka Halloween Special)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Wall Of Youth / Rabies Scare
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head get to express their innermost feeling in a special art exhibit. / Beavis becomes rabid.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Pool Toys / Beavis & Butt-Head's Island
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head help Mr. Anderson build an in-ground swimming pool. / "Beavis and Butt-head get stranded on their own island, while in search of cool chicks, like Ginger.BALL BREAKERS: Just how DO you crack open a bowling ball?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Substitute / Shopping List
programme.desc: A substitute teacher tries unconventional methods to reach Beavis and Butt-head. / Tom Anderson sends Beavis and Butt-head to the store to pick up a few items. They don't do a very good job.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Holy Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head is really screwed when a visit to the hospital once again awakens The Great Cornoholio in Beavis. But two rooms over, the leader of a cult has died. Is the Great Cornholio destined to be the cult's idiot savior?

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bedpans & Broomsticks / Yogurt's Cool (aka Try Yogurt)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head pay off a debt to society by doing community service work in a hospital. / A suggestive commercial convinces Beavis & Butt-head it's time to try frozen yogurt.
programme.sub-title: Bedpans & Broomsticks / Yogurt's Cool (aka Try Yogurt)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.
programme.sub-title: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood. / While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.
programme.sub-title: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy. / Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.
programme.sub-title: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Figure Drawing / Date Bait
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes. / The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap
programme.desc: Beavis starts mimicing Butt-Head / A quiet day in Highland, Texas / Our duo enrolls in a fitness class
programme.sub-title: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Scared Straight / Citizen Butt-head Part 2
programme.desc: To teach them that crime doesn't pay, Beavis & Butt-head's principal sends them to prison for a day. Bad idea. / Beavis & Butt-head and President Clinton explore chaos theory together.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sporting goods / Cow tipping
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head decide to get athletic gear supporters for gym class / The duo venture out on a quest for cow tipping

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den rare jenta / Tidsreisen
programme.desc: Beavis møter en hemmelig beundrer på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head krysser frem og tilbake over delstatslinjen inn i Mountain Time Zone og tror de kan reise i tiden.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Manners Suck / Pipe Of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher. / Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nyren / Den gode handling
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis ødelegger nyren og en donor fra hans fortid redder dagen./ Beavis og Butt-Head utfører sin første gode gjerning ved å ha DDT i bowlen på skoledansen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head miss the schoolbus home / The duo makes a Late Night Show / Beavis and Butt-Head are invited to play football
programme.sub-title: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Tak / Elv
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head blir sittende fast på taket av Tom Andersons hus./ Beavis og Butt-Head seiler på dekk i en elv og ender opp på sjøen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Choke / Career day
programme.desc: Eating chicken can be hazardous / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: An Emotional Beginning
programme.desc: Treningsleiren begynner og Kelli sier hvor skapet skal stå. Noen av jentene bryter sammen når de innser hvor vanskelig det er å bli en DCC. Melissa Rycroft gir dem håp og råd om hvordan de skal klare seg.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Cuts Begin
programme.desc: Kelli og Judy må sende ti jenter hjem for å komme ned til troppens magiske 36. Tilpassingen av drakter viser Kelli hvem som har alt. Når de begynner å sende folk hjem, knuses drømmer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Becoming World Class
programme.desc: Jentene får DCC-looken, som er til hjelp for noen, men ikke andre. To gjester overrasker på treningen og rocker DCCs verden. Kelli opplever en av de pinligste kontorsbesøkene noensinne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Having A Bad Day
programme.desc: Cameo- og showgruppe-uttak presser de nye og veteranene til bristepunktet. Melissa Rycroft forsøker å redde en DCC som henger i en tynn tråd, og et besøk på Kellis kontor avsluttes på en sjokkerende måte.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Cutting Board
programme.desc: Følelsene stormer når Kelli og Judy må ta vanskelige valg og sende folk hjem for å beholde troppens kvalitet. Melissa Rycroft deler ut uvurderlige råd.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Kelli kunngjør endelig troppen. Skader truer starten på Cowboys treningsleir. Kaos på kampdagen kan ødelegge for jentene når opptredenen må være feilfri.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Drømmen starter
programme.desc: Hundrevis av vakre og talentfulle håpefulle ankommer for å prøve å bli verdens beste heiagjeng. Samtidig søker mange av jentene som må dra, forsoning.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Nydebut-jentene
programme.desc: Veteranene kjemper for plassene mens de nye prøver å leve drømmene og gjennomgå treningsleiren til DCC. De stilles overfor panelintervjuer, soloer, en slitsom dansekombinasjon og et rom med tøffe dommere.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dette er sværingene
programme.desc: De nye kandidatene får en tankevekker om hva det innebærer å være en DCC. Jentene kjemper for å lære dansene. Melissa Rycroft treffer nykommerne for første gang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Time to Push
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit; Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship; stress increases on makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Big Surprises
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up; uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show approach; two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Intervention
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko; Kitty Carter rocks some of the candidate's worlds; cameos give Kelli and Judy a fresh perspective on the girls; at Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Rehearsals with the Stars
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp comes to an end; Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake; Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Squad announcement feels bittersweet as some favorites go home; the team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting; Game Day arrives.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Judge's Showcase
programme.desc: Lagets største og mest talentfulle klassen på treningsleiren må imponere DCC-dommerne med soloer og gruppedans for å få være med. Melissa Rycroft er også med.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: You Came To Play!
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft kommer til første øvelse for å lete etter artistmentorer. Så rusker Brittany Perry-Russell opp i kandidatene med koreografien sin.. Med Melissa Rycroft og Brittany Perry-Russell.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Call the Medic!
programme.desc: Kandidatene får lære teknikker så sparkene blir ennå høyere. Kelli blir urolig for en kandidat da Evan Miller underviser i hurtigkoreografi. Med Melissa Page og Evan Miller.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Et sosialt medie-dilemma
programme.desc: Denise DiCharry underviser i koreografi på høyt nivå for å se hvilke som lærer raskt. Kelli blir bedre kjent med de ferske kandidatene under uniformsprøvene. Kommer et upassende innlegg i sosiale medier til å føre til at en av jentene blir avstengt?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Stomp The Roach!
programme.desc: Judy lærer ut DCC-entreen og kandidatene må ta splitthopp for første gang, ikke alle like vellykkede. En øvelse for nybegynnere avslører de svakere kandidatene..

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Turn Them Out
programme.desc: Criscilla Anderson underviser i L.A.-koreografi og noen får en dyrekjøpt livserfaring. Travis Wall er koreograf og har vunnet Emmy, og kommer for å hjelpe Kelli og Judy med noen vanskelige avgjørelser.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Show Group Showdown
programme.desc: DCC-kandidatenes opptaksprøve for ettertraktede stillinger i elitegruppen. Visse kandidater ligger dårlig an da 5 til skal bort av de 36 beste.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: It’s another grueling shift for team at Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty Department. Juggling a backlog of walk-in patients and a constant stream of new ambulance emergencies, they’re struggling to keep waiting times down.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: Today, the pace at Barnsley Casualty is relentless; other hospitals in the area are full and as a result, ambulances are being diverted to Barnsley. In one of them is 17-year-old Alex who has had a fit after falling from his bike..

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 10
programme.desc: Sister Rachel is running the shift and she’s under pressure with a shortage of cubicles. To make matters worse, IT systems start to fail across the hospital causing chaos for patient flow.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 11
programme.desc: It’s only the start of her shift but Sister Jane Hawksworth has lost count of the number of times the emergency red phone has rung. Resus is completely full of the most ill patients and it’s having a knock-on effect across the whole department.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 12
programme.desc: At Barnsley casualty today, there’s no available beds, no movement on the wards and no patient flow. To make matters worse, the lead nurse in charge, Kelly, is also struggling with a backlog of ambulances waiting with patients needing treatment.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 13
programme.desc: The staff at Barnsley casualty are enjoying an unusually peaceful start to the day and superstition dictates that on days like this, there’s one word that must never be uttered - the Q word!

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 14
programme.desc: There’s a new Matron in charge at Barnsley Casualty today - it’s Hannah’s first day in her new role but it’s not going to be an easy one. The department is completely full, there’s no movement and patients just keep on arriving.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 15
programme.desc: The first heatwave of summer has hit Barnsley and it’s adding to the pressure of an already stressful day in casualty for Sister Jane who’s in charge today. The department is hot, stuffy, and bursting with patients all needing emergency treatment.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 16
programme.desc: It’s another relentless shift for the team at Barnsley casualty and running the hub today is Sister Jane. Staff are struggling to meet the 15-minute assessment target time but doing all they can.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 17
programme.desc: It’s a big day at Barnsley Casualty, for the first time since the Covid pandemic hit the UK, staff can finally remove their masks. For some it’s a happy, welcome relief, but others aren’t ready to go mask-free just yet.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 18
programme.desc: It’s the hottest day of the year at Barnsley Casualty. Sister Vicky has the job of keeping patients and staff cool, but with temperatures outside approaching forty degrees, it won’t be easy.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 19
programme.desc: There’s a covid spike at Barnsley Casualty and positive cases are flooding in adding pressure to an already busy day. Sister Rachel is in charge today and because of covid she’s short on space and staff.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 20
programme.desc: Patients are flooding into Barnsley Casualty today and Sister Jane is in charge and up to her eyes. Suddenly a patient who has come in with stomachache goes into labor - she had no idea she was pregnant.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: In tonight’s first episode, severe weather conditions are placing the casualty department under even more pressure than usual. Clocking on today is Consultant Dr Julian Humphrey who has a reputation for keeping staff morale high .

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: In tonight’s episode, staffing problems hit the department as several nurses call in sick. The team clocking on is forced to juggle extra patients to make sure every emergency is seen.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: In tonight’s episode, patient numbers are through the roof and the team are facing the busiest day in Barnsley Casualty’s history. Lead Nurse Zoe Pearce is tasked with managing the beds to make them available for Barnsley’s most poorly people.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the team of Barnsley Casualty pull together to treat a new raft of emergency patients. They work like a family to face the best and worst of life together.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: It’s Monday at Barnsley Casualty, traditionally the busiest day of the week and they’re expecting to treat 277 patients. But it soon becomes clear that this shift could break the hospital record of 349 patients, a number that no-one wants to beat.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Freezing fog has descended across the whole of South Yorkshire so Barnsley Casualty is inundated with weather-related accidents and emergencies.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: Hoarding is on the rise and it's believed that 1 in 20 people could have a problem. With over 1.2 million problem hoarders in the UK today, one could be your neighbour?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: Susan's hoard has made her virtually homeless. Brian has dedicated his life to hoarding and his daughter is sick of it. Jake is lucky to be alive as his home almost burned to the ground in an inferno fuelled by the clutter he'd collected.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: Arthur's flat is packed with junk. Experts Caz and Tee are up for their toughest assignment ever. Khim is getting married but first she must clear her hoard. Mandi's passion for vintage clothes is out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: Esther's hoard is so bad her landlord told her to clear up or clear out. Nigel receives a visit from fellow hoarder Janice.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: Paul's hoard fills his whole house, room after room after room is buried under 6 feet of clutter.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Sue from Oxford whose house is overflowing with possessions. Sue married the love of her life in 2015, and he moved in, bringing everything he owned with him.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 11
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Joanna from Birmingham, whose 2-bedroom flat is overflowing with possessions. Joanna works two jobs, leaving her no time to look after her home.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the picturesque city of Bath, Paul’s cottage is bursting at the seams with a lifetime’s collection of junk. Known locally as ‘boot cottage’ - because everything Paul owns and wears comes from car boot sales - every room is a no-go zone.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: In Harlow, 63-year-old Bubbles’ high-rise flat is packed with piles of junk she can’t bear to throw away. But it doesn’t end there she also has a staggering 4 lock ups stuffed to the gills with rubbish.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In Mansfield Sue’s hoard is driving her family and grandchildren away and her husband Neil to distraction. Every room is crammed with clutter including a bedroom that looks more like a dolls graveyard than somewhere to sleep.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Liverpool, the Bells are a family at war over hoarding. Mum Betty and son Richard are happy to live in their mess, but son in law Keith is determined that things must change. Can they change the habit of a lifetime and part with their possessions?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: In the London suburb of Enfield, former workaholic Sandra has become a hoard-aholic since retiring. Her compulsion to spend is out of control, and everything is added to the growing mountains of books, clothes and candles…

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of American born dog loving Dani from Shepton Mallet who moved to the UK with high hopes of living the English Country dream, but bad health got the better of her.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 7
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Eco warrior Karen from Somerset, who after many years of living off grid in a caravan, has struggled to adapt to living in, and looking after, a house.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 8
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Pippa and Matt from Oxford who have 6 kids all living in a 3-bedroom house. With both parents working full time, the house has taken a back seat for many years.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 6
programme.desc: In South Wales, 49-year-old Alison has always been a hoarder. What started as a passion for teddy bears has transformed into an obsession for. She currently has 11 and they rule the house, at least the bits they can get to in between the hoard…

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 8
programme.desc: 79-year-old Joyce moved into her dream home in Liverpool nearly 40 years ago with her partner, Norman. But when he passed away, she lost her battle to keep on top of the hoarding behavior she inherited from her mum.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 9
programme.desc: What happens when a hoarder can no longer live safely in their home and the family are left to pick up the pieces? House clearance experts Ange and Yvonne have been called in by the daughters of a lifelong hoarder to clear their dad’s house.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: When a skip lorry breaks down on the M1, Recovery stalwart Rory has to risk life and limb to get it recovered. Jim has a happy reunion with his own truck - but the smile is quickly wiped off his face when he has to pick up a mangled mail truck!

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: Recovery op Jim Howard is dispatched to a serious incident. A van has collided with an artic forcing the vehicles behind to brake suddenly resulting in a major pile up. Recovery op Marta is struggling to collect an artic from a lorry graveyard.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: Recovery Ops Marta and Pat have to pull a bin lorry out of a muddy ditch - luckily, they have a specialized off-road vehicle that is just the tool for the job. Recovery drivers Roman and Nick have to deliver an antique tank worth 20 grand to a buyer.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: When a tanker carrying highly corrosive pure sulphuric acid smashes into the central reservation of a busy A road and overturns, Recovery Experts Jim and Steve rush to the scene and immediately call for backup.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Some of Crouch's finest are joined by Lantern Recovery's female operative Merrie at a bus depot. The owners lost 10 of their school coaches to a devastating fire and now need the burned-out shells removed in order to bring in a new fleet.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: There's no rest for recovery operators and this time it's all hands to the pump as several of Crouch's finest are joined by Lantern Recovery's female operative Merrie at a bus depot in Tamworth.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: A 44-ton food lorry is on fire, putting motorists in grave danger. Steve Kelly and his team need to get it shifted off the road as quickly as possible, making this one of the most dangerous jobs the team has ever encountered.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: Crouch Ops Rob and Lee race to the scene of a horrific traffic collision where a van has slid out of control on a country lane and landed on top of a car. With the car wedged underneath the van, the recovery team is faced with a complex challenge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Incident Manager Steve and the team are called out to upright an artic that's rolled over on the A1. With rush hour fast approaching, the boys need to raise the heavyweight payload before they cause traffic mayhem.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Crane Operator Nick cannot find a 4x4 that has taken the term 'off road' to another level on the busy A10 and is buried on its side in a water-filled ditch. Once it's discovered he is forced to stop his truck in a live lane to winch it out.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: Recovery op Tez has to fly to a job. After a birdstrike, a 44-ton artic needs rescuing from the side of the busy A1 dual carriageway, one of the UK's deadliest roads. Double act, Stig and Lee need to shift a totaled tractor with a busted axle.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Incident Manager Steve is sent to coordinate a recovery on the Northbound A1 after a collision that has closed both lanes. With a Bin Lorry on its side in a ditch and a truck pulling a refrigerated container rolled over, this is a major job.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: On the M1, Crouch incident manager, Steve, and his team face a massive task trying to recover a 26-ton lorry that careened off the motorway, catapulted across a 6-foot ditch, broke through a fence, and landed a shocking 30 meters from the road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: Steve and the team attempt to rescue an enormous rubble truck that's tipped over in a ditch. Forced to close the road they're up against the clock, but having to work in the dark is making the job a lot more precarious.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Stig is called out to an oil tanker stuck in the mud in the middle of an isolated farm track. Stig is forced to reverse his massive truck through the surrounding tiny lanes to try and reach the stranded truck from the other side.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Tez and the team get in a jam when they recover a parcel lorry that has taken the term 'stuck in the post' to another level. They have the risky job of getting it shifted before rush hour begins.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: A delivery truck's in hot water, cab first into a pond, and its recovery ops Sean and Michael in at the deep end, figuring out how to extract a 38-ton delivery lorry from its watery grave.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: A tipper truck has spun 180 degrees and slid down a steep motorway embankment. The job calls for a five-man team, 2 trucks, and a crane. Lee faces his biggest fear trying to locate a remote yard, before coming face to face with a stranded school bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Recovery driver Sean is faced with a thorny problem when he tries to recover an SUV that's skidded on black ice and ended up 20 feet down a ditch, wedged in dense shrubbery.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: Stig is called to the hard shoulder of the M45 to help a scrap truck with a broken wheel bearing. This is a tough job even for a man of Stig's abilities as he deals with the job next to the live lane of the motorway with his usual grace and charm.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 202
programme.desc: Tidlig en søndag morgen i 2004 er den 22 år gamle sykepleierstudenten Anne Slåtten på vei til jobb, men hun dukker aldri opp. Etter et døgn blir hun funnet drept i. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av den omsorgsfulle jenta?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 501
programme.desc: Gjenopptakelseskommisjonen har siden 2018 vurdert om Norges mest kjente drapssak skal etterforskes på ny. Skal det endelig lykkes Per og Veronica Orderud å få gjenopptatt saken?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 302
programme.desc: I september 2003 blir en gutt seksuelt misbrukt av en mann i trappeoppgangen der han bor. Politiet starter en intens jakt på mannens identitet for å få stoppet ham. Samtidig kommer det stadig inn nye meldinger om overgrep.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 402
programme.desc: En sommerdag i 1999 sykler tolv år gamle Kristin Juel Johannessen hjemmefra på vei til badestranda. Samme kveld blir hun meldt savnet. Hvor har den unge jenta tatt veien?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 705
programme.desc: Psykolog Helena Bering forsvinner sporløst midt på dagen den 18. august 2004. Hun har nettopp avsluttet et møte med en klient på klinikken i Stockholm, når alle spor etter henne forsvinner.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 503
programme.desc: I 2007 kommer en mann og hans mor inn på politistasjonen i Bergen for å underrette om at hans kone, Dung Tran Larsen, har vært savnet i en uke. Hva skjedde egentlig med Dung?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 303
programme.desc: Tidlig på 90-tallet rystes den norske befolkningen av flere kirkebranner. I 1993 blir Øystein Aarseth funnet død i en trappeoppgang i Oslo. Politiet retter søkelyset mot enkelte personer i black-metal-miljøet. En av disse er Varg Vikernes.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 401
programme.desc: I mai 1995 blir 17 år gamle Birgitte Tengs funnet drept bare noen få hundre meter unna sitt hjem i Kopervik på Karmøy. Saken fører til omfattende etterforskning, og Birgittes fetter havner raskt i søkelyset.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 703
programme.desc: 18 år gamle Ndella Jack har nettopp kommet hjem fra bryllupsreise med mannen sin. Det som skulle være starten på deres liv sammen, får i stedet en brå slutt, da de blir ofre for et brutalt angrep.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 205
programme.desc: Etter meldinger om et rykende bål i Hafjell går drapsalarmen hos politiet på Lillehammer. På bålet viser det seg å ligge rester av et partert menneske. Samtidig meldes to personer savnet fra en bolig i nærheten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305
programme.desc: 19. desember 1994 setter Bjørn Thore Langemyhr seg på et tog fra Tønsberg til Oslo. Det er det siste familien ser til ham. Samtidig begynner ryktene å gå om at et belastet rusmiljø kan ha tatt livet av Langemyhr.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter en fest i juli 2017 forsvinner Tom Rune Hagen. Han har vært en del av et belastet rusmiljø, men akkurat denne uka har han planlagt en tur på fjellet for å fiske. Hva skjedde med Tom Rune?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 701
programme.desc: I september 2020 blir Erik Fasth funnet livløs i en blodpøl utenfor rommet til den funksjonshemmede kvinnen han er assistent for. Politiet begynner umiddelbart å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 502
programme.desc: I 2016 går politiet til aksjon i en privatbolig på Romerike. På eierens datamaskin finner de harddisker fulle av bilder og videosnutter med seksuelle handlinger fra unge gutter ned i 9-årsalderen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 103
programme.desc: To turgåere finner et utbrent lik på et bål langs en øde skogsbilvei på Veståsen i Søndre Land. I flere uker står politiet helt uten svar på hvem som kan stå bak den groteske handlingen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 204
programme.desc: På kvelden 1. nyttårsdag i 2012 utløses trygghetsalarmen hjemme hos 98 år gamle Hilda Feste. Da hjemmetjenesten rykker ut blir de vitne til en grufull hendelse. Politiet starter umiddelbart opp jakten på gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Calvin, Rudy, and Milo
programme.desc: A ridgeback mix needs help recovering from a car accident that left him with three-legs; a manic Jack Russell chases motorcycles; and a border collie's herding instincts are out of control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Titan, Candy and Bella
programme.desc: A new puppy has "Young and Restless" soap star Michael Damian's cat cornered, MTV's "Downtown" Julie Brown wants to unspoil her Yorkie, and a 120-pound Rottweiler needs anger management training.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Joe, and Penny, Roxy, Rico, Lou, & Solomon, and Promise
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is so devoted to his owner that he breaks leashes to be with her; a neurotic beagle makes trouble for a pack of foster dogs; and an Italian mastiff puppy fears riding in cars.
programme.sub-title: Joe, and Penny, Roxy, Rico, Lou, & Solomon, and Promise

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bodhi, Maggie & Molly, and Bojo
programme.desc: Bloodhound/Catahoula mix, Bojo, is aggressive when it comes to mealtime. Molly and Maggie, two territorial Maltese, and a Kerry Blue Terrier in need of some calm assertive energy.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Chloe and various dogs
programme.desc: Cesar Millan joins the volunteers of United Hope for Animals to rescue stray pets, and to educate the citizens of Tijuana about the serious problem of overpopulation of dogs and cats in Mexico.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: various dogs and Chuy, Jack & Carmine
programme.desc: When several tenant's canines can't seem to get along, Cesar is called in to restore peace to a dog friendly complex. Cesar meets two feuding Chihuahuas and a Jack Russell Terrier.
programme.sub-title: various dogs and Chuy, Jack & Carmine

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Cotton, Ricky, and Lila & Duke
programme.desc: An American Eskimo watchdog who takes his role too far; a Shibu Inu with a mean streak; a boxer who was attached by another dog one day in the park, and has since become more aggressive.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Amber, Snoopy, & Schroeder
programme.desc: A couple who can’t seem to control their high-strung Golden Retriever mix; Snoopy, a belligerent Bearded Collie; and Schroeder, an adopted a Lhasa Apso/Cavalier King Charles Spaniel mix with a bad case of separation anxiety.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lotus, Rocco, Hootie
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace in a spiritual home after Lotus doesn’t live up to his tranquil name; A lesson on keeping dogs safe from venomous wildlife; The return of Hootie.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Kiko, Tootsie & Ginger, and Binkey
programme.desc: A bullying miniature pinscher moves to Camp Pendleton. A Chihuahua mix. Writer, actor and director Mike White’s French bulldogs are out of control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Reggie, Diva, Rocco, & Vito, and Mugsy
programme.desc: Meet a feral dog who likes to guard pregnant horses on a ranch. English bulldog Rocco joins an existing pack and targets one of his brothers. A rescued pit bull terrier is a couch potato.
programme.sub-title: Reggie, Diva, Rocco, & Vito, and Mugsy

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Luna and K9 Sniffers
programme.desc: A lab mix, has an extreme fear of dog parks, walks and noises at home. Meet a pack of dogs that spends its days keeping the port of Miami free of drugs, and explosives.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Willie, Make-A-Wish and Zena
programme.desc: A dog whose extreme fear of the stove has forced her owners to cook on a grill. Two dogs battle for control of the house. A Jack Russell terrier who can't handle the death of his pack leader.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Hudson & Orchid, and LA Animal Control
programme.desc: Two Great Danes battle for control. Cesar helps the city of Los Angeles' Animal Control department with its aggressive new pet ownership program by riding along with one of its officers.
programme.sub-title: Hudson & Orchid, and LA Animal Control

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Gus, Abbey, and Vinnie
programme.desc: Tonight Show sidekick Ed McMahon’s dog is aggressive. A beagle won't leave the house. An Australian shepherd is so territorial of his owner's house that no one has visited in two years.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Caged Shepherd, Tinkling Terrier
programme.desc: Troy, a German Shepherd, is aggressive towards the other animals in his home. Roxie, a Rat Terrier, is so timid that when a sudden noise disturbs her, she’ll pee on the floor.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Widow’s Dogs, Drool Dog, Dexter Follow-up
programme.desc: A retriever mix, and wire hair fox terriers siblings, have turned into a combative pack. A Sharpei/Dobie mix drools excessively. Rottie mix Dexter travels to Los Angeles for a refresher course.
programme.sub-title: Widow’s Dogs, Drool Dog, Dexter Follow-up

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: ATF Dog
programme.desc: Gavin, a decorated K-9 explosive sniffing agent for the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, is terrified of loud noises. Cesar uses some creative tactics to rehabilitate him.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Glødhet katolsk kjærlighet
programme.desc: Presten Maxi reiser til Roma da skandalen i den katolske kirken truer med å påvirke antallet kirkegjengere i South Park negativt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Den skumle fisken
programme.desc: Sharon Marshs tante Flo har gaver til Shelly og Stan. Shelly får et flott stereoanlegg, mens Stan får en skummel fisk.

programme.title: South Park: Succubusen
programme.desc: Cartman går til optiker, som gjør narr av Cartmans vektproblemer og kaller ham 'Piggy'.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: Da Wall-Mart kom til byen
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle prøver å forhindre at Wall-Mart forvandler South Park til en spøkelsesby, men en besatt Cartman står i deres vei.

programme.title: South Park: Fåraktig
programme.desc: Mens han er på en gruppeterapitime mot hamstring, blir Stan fanget i en drøm om skolerådgiveren Mr. Mackey.

programme.title: South Park: Gothbarn 3: posørenes daggry
programme.desc: Goth-ungene sendes på leir for problembarn.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium er ikke gratis
programme.desc: Stan blir avhengig av det nye mobilspillet med Terrance og Phillip.

programme.title: South Park: Heksesønner
programme.desc: På den årlige Halloween-sammenkomsten, kaster en heks trolldom som terroriserer alle i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Råtne tomater
programme.desc: Barna i South Park påstår at de har sett mr. Garrison luske rundt i byen. Folk i byen er sinte fordi presidenten skremmer barna deres.

programme.title: South Park: Sparkesyklene
programme.desc: Ungene planlegger å bruke siste nytt innen forflytning for å skaffe seg mer godteri til halloween enn de har fått noen gang.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms Halloween Special
programme.desc: Det er Halloween og Randy må forholde seg til datterens marihuanaproblem.

programme.title: South Park: Øyekatarr
programme.desc: Det er Halloween i South Park, og Kenny blir drept av en styrtende romstasjon og forvandlet til en zombie, ved hjelp av balsameringsvæske og Worcestersaus.

programme.title: South Park: Universets største drittsekk
programme.desc: Cartman føler seg ikke bra etter å ha drukket Kennys aske og blitt besatt av sjelen hans, og sendes til sykehuset.

programme.title: South Park: Helvete på jord 2006
programme.desc: Det er halloween, og Satan holder verdens største kostymefest.

programme.title: South Park: De levende hjemløses natt
programme.desc: Uteliggere oversvømmer South Park, og guttene legger en lur plan for å flytte dem til en annen by, mens de voksne får panikk.

programme.title: South Park: Den ustoppelige
programme.desc: Evig uskyldige Butters er lei behandlingen han får av foreldrene, og blir litt for oppslukt av den nye vampyrfeberen.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Zimmermans verdenskrig
programme.desc: Cartman anser Token for å være en trussel mot hele menneskeheten.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Glødhet katolsk kjærlighet
programme.desc: Presten Maxi reiser til Roma da skandalen i den katolske kirken truer med å påvirke antallet kirkegjengere i South Park negativt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Den skumle fisken
programme.desc: Sharon Marshs tante Flo har gaver til Shelly og Stan. Shelly får et flott stereoanlegg, mens Stan får en skummel fisk.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Terrible Savior
programme.desc: Witness descriptions of a vigilante lead Catherine to fear Vincent may be a killer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Siege
programme.desc: Vincent helps the residents of an apartment building defend their homes against thugs who want them out so the land can be re-developed.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: No Way Down
programme.desc: Injured in an explosion, Vincent is captured by a vicious street gang.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Masques
programme.desc: Free to walk the streets openly on Halloween, Vincent becomes the guardian of an Irish peace activist who's been targeted for assassination.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Beast Within
programme.desc: Vincent must choose loyalties when a childhood friend becomes a mob enforcer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nor Iron Bars a Cage
programme.desc: Accidentally caught on film, Vincent become the target of a scientist desperate to learn the truth about him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Song of Orpheus
programme.desc: When Father ventures to the Above World for the first time in decades, he is arrested for murder. Vincent and Catherine must delve into Father's mysterious past to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dark Spirit
programme.desc: Investigating a mysterious death makes Catherine the target of a voodoo cult.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Children's Story
programme.desc: Catherine learns that the city's model foster home for children is hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: An Impossible Silence
programme.desc: When she witnesses a shooting, a deaf girl must decide whether to abandon the sanctuary of the City Below to free an innocent man.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Shades of Grey

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful attorney seduces Catherine's boss, Joe Maxwell, creating a serious conflict of interest.

programme.desc: Catherine fails to heed Vincent's warnings about her dangerous former law-school beau.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Fever
programme.desc: After Mouse discovers a ship's gold and gemstones treasure buried beneath the city, Vincent's community is torn apart by greed and strife.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Little People

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Four O'Clock

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Hocus-Pocus and Frisby
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trade-Ins

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Wunderkind
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck campaign manager (John Cho) is determined to get a kid (Jacob Tremblay) elected as the President of the United States. Allison Tolman and John Larroquette guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Gift
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Dummy
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Young Man's Fancy
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Sing the Body Electric
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Not All Men
programme.desc: A meteor shower spreads infection across an entire town... affecting some of the inhabitants more than others. Taissa Farmiga, Rhea Seehorn, Luke Kirby and Ike Barinholtz guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Point of Origin
programme.desc: A suburban housewife (Ginnifer Goodwin) wants to go home. But where - and what - is home, really? Zabryna Guevara and James Frain guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Cavender is Coming
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Changing of the Guard
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: In Praise Of Pip
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Steel
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Blue Scorpion
programme.desc: The emergence of the elusive Blue Scorpion leads anthropology professor Jeff Storck (Chris O'Dowd) to his most personal research project yet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Blurryman
programme.desc: Writer Sophie Gelson (Zazie Beetz) is haunted by a mysterious figure. Seth Rogen and Betty Gabriel guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare at 20,000 Feet

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Kind of a Stopwatch

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Night of a Jockey
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.
programme.sub-title: The Last Night of a Jockey

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Living Doll

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Meet in the Middle

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Downtime

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Old Man in the Cave

programme.sub-title: The Old Man in the Cave

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Probe 7, Over and Out

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For

programme.sub-title: You Get What You Pay For

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.
