programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & Kate Horse Around
programme.desc: Charlie takes the group on an equine therapy trip.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie's Patients Hook Up
programme.desc: Two patients in Charlie's group get involved in a romantic relationship.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and Kate's Dirty Pictures
programme.desc: Charlie uses a patient to spy on Kate when he gets jealous

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Lets Kate Take Charge
programme.desc: Martin helps Charlie coach a high-school baseball team

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & The Break-Up Coach
programme.desc: Jennifer causes problems for Charlie when she becomes involved with one of his patients

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie, Kate and Jen Get Romantic
programme.desc: Martin meddles with Charlie and Kate's relationship.
programme.sub-title: Charlie, Kate and Jen Get Romantic

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Breaks Up With Kate
programme.desc: Charlie deals with Jen's ex-boyfriend

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and Kate Start a Sex Study
programme.desc: Charlie and Kate begin work on a sex study. Meanwhile, Lacey starts a new job.
programme.sub-title: Charlie and Kate Start a Sex Study

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and His New Friend With Benefits
programme.desc: Charlie enters an inappropriate relationship. Meanwhile, Nolan and Patrick fight over a woman
programme.sub-title: Charlie and His New Friend With Benefits

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and the Airport Sext
programme.desc: Charlie gets interesting news from Kate. Later, Charlie's house is used for an adult film shoot.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and His New Therapist
programme.desc: Charlie meets with an unorthodox therapist. Later, Patrick tricks Ed into thinking he won the lottery.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & The Hot Nerd
programme.desc: Charlie steals a hot woman from an angry nerd. Lacey takes drugs in order to sell drugs.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and the Secret Gigolo
programme.desc: Charlie learns scandalous information about Jen's new boyfriend, Sean, when he joins his therapy group. Also, Ed moves in with Patrick.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Dates A Serial Killer's Sister
programme.desc: Charlie picks up a woman at prison, unaware that she is the sister of one of his most violent patients. Lacey secretly puts on a strip show for Nolan
programme.sub-title: Charlie Dates A Serial Killer's Sister

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & The Cheating Patient
programme.desc: Charlie suspects Jen's boyfriend is cheating on her. Later, Nolan's apartment gets robbed.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and the Hit and Run
programme.desc: Charlie deals with the aftermath when Martin hits someone with his car. Later, Lacey takes Nolan out to a club.
programme.sub-title: Charlie and the Hit and Run

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and the Virgin
programme.desc: Charlie accidentally becomes a sex surrogate for one of Kate's patients.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Kills His Ex's Sex Life
programme.desc: Charlie becomes jealous of Jennifer's new boyfriend. Meanwhile, Patrick helps Lacey prepare for a modeling gig.
programme.sub-title: Charlie Kills His Ex's Sex Life

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and the Prison Riot
programme.desc: Charlie is held hostage during a prison riot.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and Kate Do It for Money
programme.desc: Charlie and Kate are ready to sleep with the right people to get funding for their sex study.
programme.sub-title: Charlie and Kate Do It for Money

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie And the Sting
programme.desc: Charlie intervenes in Kate's sex life. Meanwhile, Martin offers relationship advice to Lacey.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Gets the Party Started
programme.desc: Charlie and Sean plan an epic party. Meanwhile, Lacey accidentally gets Ed addicted to drugs

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and The Grad Student
programme.desc: Charlie and Nolan compete for a woman's attention. Meanwhile, Martin and Ed hatch a scam.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie's New Sex Study Partner
programme.desc: Charlie hires a psychologist to replace Kate in his sex study. Meanwhile, Jennifer and Lacey prank Sean.
